rationale: Use the built-in Reports list search to quickly locate the desired report without leaving the page

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter for the Reports list
rationale: Enable the list filter builder so we can filter Title to something like "Incidents by agent"
Scroll the Global reports list to the “Inc…” section where “Incidents by …” reports are likely located

action_text: Click the header search magnifier to run the global search
rationale: If list search is difficult to activate, running the existing global search query may surface the report quickly

action_text: Type "Incident by Assigned to" into the global search field
rationale: Refine the global search query to a likely report title (“Incident by Assigned to”) which often matches the needed report
